utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , not really .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean technically it is ... it is not against the rules or anything , but it is frowned upon .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Especially by that professor we ran into last night , Judgey von Holierthanthou .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Especially by that professor we ran into last night

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well Ross , you be careful now . You do not want to get a reputation as you know Professor McNails ... his ... students .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah . What ... what should I do ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_you be careful now . You do not want to get a reputation as you know Professor McNails ... his ... students .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well Ross , it seems pretty clear .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I mean what more important ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What people think or how you feel , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ross , you gotta follow your heart .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey that is so sweet .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey ... hey ... hey ! So , how did it go with Dana ? Any reason I should leave a block of time open say Thursday ?

utterances.text: I could not do it .

utterances.text: You could not do it ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey , relax I just need more time . We are going to dinner tonight .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What ? ! You are going out with her again !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Going out with who ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Uh , Dana Keystone from college .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh yeah ! Was not she uh

utterances.text: No , that was Dana Caplin .

utterances.text: Joey ! You did not even know her !

utterances.speaker: Joey
